title: Support for Matlab Downloaded from the Campus Software Library
body: To access this software you will need to create a Mathworks account with a *@wisc.edu email address. For early versions of Matlab (pre-2008) a passcode may be requires as opposed to a license file. Please contact licensing@doit.wisc.edu if you need that. Some of these files are very large, and will take a long time to download even on the UW network. Because of their size, we recommend that you do not use a wireless connection to download. For a step-by-step guide on how to install the software and create a Mathworks Account, please see the install guide .
